blended.narrative: Stowe is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 2,971 ft. Looking ahead, 15 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Tuesday: 2.4" of snow, highs of 50°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Sunday: 3.5" of snow, highs of 30°F. Expect variable conditions.
